# Cancel an Order

An order can be canceled easily from the order history page before it reaches the packing stage. If the packing process has started, the cancel button will no longer be available, and customers will have to refuse delivery or initiate a return once the parcel is received. Additionally, when canceling a multi-item order, all items are canceled simultaneously as partial cancellations for individual items are not permitted.

[Source: order_management.md#cancel-an-order]
